title: Almond Bhuna Pesto
description: A fresh, velvety Italian dish featuring almond butter, spiced with bhuna (a popular Indian curry spice mix) and halal-friendly.
instructions: In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and green peppers to the pan. Sauté until they soften.
Stir in almond butter and all-purpose flour into the vegetables for about 1 minute or until well combined.
Gradually add the ground Bhuna Spice Mix, coconut milk, halal chicken stock, salt, and pepper while stirring continuously.
Simmer on low heat for approximately 5 minutes. Stir occasionally to avoid burning.
Stir in fresh basil leaves, remove from heat, and let cool slightly before serving.
Drizzle with additional olive oil for a luxurious finish if desired.
